notes: DSR-framed exploratory comparative evaluation: authors themselves acted as developers building the same web app three ways (vibe coding, structured prompt engineering, Shift-Up), recording prompts, time, and journal notes, then inductively coding 176 prompts. No external human participants (developers are the authors), so human_subjects=false. The comparative build resembles a multi-condition case study/demonstration rather than a controlled experiment (n=1 project, no controls, iteratively modified protocol).
